lines.gurmukhi: ਛਛੈ ਛਾਇਆ ਵਰਤੀ ਸਭ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਤੇਰਾ ਕੀਆ ਭਰਮੁ ਹੋਆ ॥
lines.translit: chhachhai chhaaeaa varatee sabh antar teraa keea bharam hoaa |
lines.english: Chhachha: Ignorance exists within everyone; doubt is Your doing, O Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਰਮੁ ਉਪਾਇ ਭੁਲਾਈਅਨੁ ਆਪੇ ਤੇਰਾ ਕਰਮੁ ਹੋਆ ਤਿਨੑ ਗੁਰੂ ਮਿਲਿਆ ॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: bharam upaae bhulaaeean aape teraa karam hoaa tina guroo miliaa |10|
lines.english: Having created doubt, You Yourself cause them to wander in delusion; those whom You bless with Your Mercy meet with the Guru. ||10||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਜੈ ਜਾਨੁ ਮੰਗਤ ਜਨੁ ਜਾਚੈ ਲਖ ਚਉਰਾਸੀਹ ਭੀਖ ਭਵਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: jajai jaan mangat jan jaachai lakh chauraaseeh bheekh bhaviaa |
lines.english: Jajja: That humble being who begs for wisdom has wandered begging through 8.4 million incarnations.

lines.gurmukhi: ਝਝੈ ਝੂਰਿ ਮਰਹੁ ਕਿਆ ਪ੍ਰਾਣੀ ਜੋ ਕਿਛੁ ਦੇਣਾ ਸੁ ਦੇ ਰਹਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: jhajhai jhoor marahu kiaa praanee jo kichh denaa su de rahiaa |
lines.english: Jhajha: O mortal being, why are you dying of anxiety? Whatever the Lord is to give, He shall keep on giving.

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕੋ ਲੇਵੈ ਏਕੋ ਦੇਵੈ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਦੂਜਾ ਮੈ ਸੁਣਿਆ ॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: eko levai eko devai avar na doojaa mai suniaa |11|
lines.english: The One Lord takes away, and the One Lord gives; I have not heard of any other. ||11||

lines.gurmukhi: ਞੰਞੈ ਨਦਰਿ ਕਰੇ ਜਾ ਦੇਖਾ ਦੂਜਾ ਕੋਈ ਨਾਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: yanyai nadar kare jaa dekhaa doojaa koee naahee |
lines.english: Nyanya: When the Lord bestows His Glance of Grace, then I do not behold any other.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੇ ਦੇ ਵੇਖੈ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਚਲਾਏ ਜਿਉ ਜੀਆ ਕਾ ਰਿਜਕੁ ਪਇਆ ॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: de de vekhai hukam chalaae jiau jeea kaa rijak peaa |12|
lines.english: He gives, and gives, and watches over us; according to the Orders which He issues, His beings receive nourishment. ||12||

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕੋ ਰਵਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਸਭ ਥਾਈ ਏਕੁ ਵਸਿਆ ਮਨ ਮਾਹੀ ॥੧੩॥
lines.translit: eko rav rahiaa sabh thaaee ek vasiaa man maahee |13|
lines.english: The One Lord is totally pervading everywhere; the One Lord abides within the mind. ||13||

lines.gurmukhi: ਟਟੈ ਟੰਚੁ ਕਰਹੁ ਕਿਆ ਪ੍ਰਾਣੀ ਘੜੀ ਕਿ ਮੁਹਤਿ ਕਿ ਉਠਿ ਚਲਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: ttattai ttanch karahu kiaa praanee gharree ki muhat ki utth chalanaa |
lines.english: Tatta: Why do you practice hypocrisy, O mortal? In a moment, in an instant, you shall have to get up and depart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੂਐ ਜਨਮੁ ਨ ਹਾਰਹੁ ਅਪਣਾ ਭਾਜਿ ਪੜਹੁ ਤੁਮ ਹਰਿ ਸਰਣਾ ॥੧੪॥
lines.translit: jooai janam na haarahu apanaa bhaaj parrahu tum har saranaa |14|
lines.english: Don't lose your life in the gamble - hurry to the Lord's Sanctuary. ||14||

lines.gurmukhi: ਠਠੈ ਠਾਢਿ ਵਰਤੀ ਤਿਨ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਚਰਣੀ ਜਿਨੑ ਕਾ ਚਿਤੁ ਲਾਗਾ ॥
lines.translit: tthatthai tthaadt varatee tin antar har charanee jina kaa chit laagaa |
lines.english: T'hat'ha: Peace pervades within those who link their consciousness to the Lord's Lotus Feet.

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਿਤੁ ਲਾਗਾ ਸੇਈ ਜਨ ਨਿਸਤਰੇ ਤਉ ਪਰਸਾਦੀ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ॥੧੫॥
lines.translit: chit laagaa seee jan nisatare tau parasaadee sukh paaeaa |15|
lines.english: Those humble beings, whose consciousness is so linked, are saved; by Your Grace, they obtain peace. ||15||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੈ ਸਰੇਵਹੁ ਤਾ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਵਹੁ ਸਰਬ ਨਿਰੰਤਰਿ ਰਵਿ ਰਹਿਆ ॥੧੬॥
lines.translit: tisai sarevahu taa sukh paavahu sarab nirantar rav rahiaa |16|
lines.english: So serve Him, who is contained and pervading among everyone, and you shall obtain peace. ||16||

lines.gurmukhi: ਡਡੈ ਡੰਫੁ ਕਰਹੁ ਕਿਆ ਪ੍ਰਾਣੀ ਜੋ ਕਿਛੁ ਹੋਆ ਸੁ ਸਭੁ ਚਲਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: ddaddai ddanf karahu kiaa praanee jo kichh hoaa su sabh chalanaa |
lines.english: Dadda: Why do you make such ostentatious shows, O mortal? Whatever exists, shall all pass away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਢਢੈ ਢਾਹਿ ਉਸਾਰੈ ਆਪੇ ਜਿਉ ਤਿਸੁ ਭਾਵੈ ਤਿਵੈ ਕਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: dtadtai dtaeh usaarai aape jiau tis bhaavai tivai kare |
lines.english: Dhadha: He Himself establishes and disestablishes; as it pleases His Will, so does He act.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਕਰਿ ਵੇਖੈ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਚਲਾਏ ਤਿਸੁ ਨਿਸਤਾਰੇ ਜਾ ਕਉ ਨਦਰਿ ਕਰੇ ॥੧੭॥
lines.translit: kar kar vekhai hukam chalaae tis nisataare jaa kau nadar kare |17|
lines.english: Having created the creation, He watches over it; He issues His Commands, and emancipates those, upon whom He casts His Glance of Grace. ||17||

lines.gurmukhi: ਣਾਣੈ ਰਵਤੁ ਰਹੈ ਘਟ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵੈ ਸੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: naanai ravat rahai ghatt antar har gun gaavai soee |
lines.english: Nanna: One whose heart is filled with the Lord, sings His Glorious Praises.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਤੈ ਤਾਰੂ ਭਵਜਲੁ ਹੋਆ ਤਾ ਕਾ ਅੰਤੁ ਨ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: tatai taaroo bhavajal hoaa taa kaa ant na paaeaa |
lines.english: Tatta: The terrible world-ocean is so very deep; its limits cannot be found.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਆਪਿ ਮਿਲਾਏ ਕਰਤਾ ਪੁਨਰਪਿ ਜਨਮੁ ਨ ਹੋਈ ॥੧੮॥
lines.translit: aape aap milaae karataa punarap janam na hoee |18|
lines.english: One whom the Creator Lord unites with Himself, is not consigned to reincarnation. ||18||

lines.gurmukhi: ਥਥੈ ਥਾਨਿ ਥਾਨੰਤਰਿ ਸੋਈ ਜਾ ਕਾ ਕੀਆ ਸਭੁ ਹੋਆ ॥
lines.translit: thathai thaan thaanantar soee jaa kaa keea sabh hoaa |
lines.english: T'hat'ha: In all places and interspaces, He is; everything which exists, is by His doing.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾ ਤਰ ਨਾ ਤੁਲਹਾ ਹਮ ਬੂਡਸਿ ਤਾਰਿ ਲੇਹਿ ਤਾਰਣ ਰਾਇਆ ॥੧੯॥
lines.translit: naa tar naa tulahaa ham booddas taar lehi taaran raaeaa |19|
lines.english: I do not have a boat, or even a raft; I am drowning - save me, O Savior King! ||19||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਦੈ ਦੋਸੁ ਨ ਦੇਊ ਕਿਸੈ ਦੋਸੁ ਕਰੰਮਾ ਆਪਣਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: dadai dos na deaoo kisai dos karamaa aapaniaa |
lines.english: Dadda: Do not blame anyone else; blame instead your own actions.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਆ ਭਰਮੁ ਕਿਆ ਮਾਇਆ ਕਹੀਐ ਜੋ ਤਿਸੁ ਭਾਵੈ ਸੋਈ ਭਲਾ ॥੨੦॥
lines.translit: kiaa bharam kiaa maaeaa kaheeai jo tis bhaavai soee bhalaa |20|
lines.english: What is doubt? What is called Maya? Whatever pleases Him is good. ||20||

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਧੈ ਧਾਰਿ ਕਲਾ ਜਿਨਿ ਛੋਡੀ ਹਰਿ ਚੀਜੀ ਜਿਨਿ ਰੰਗ ਕੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: dhadhai dhaar kalaa jin chhoddee har cheejee jin rang keea |
lines.english: Dhadha: His power established and upholds the earth; the Lord has imparted His color to everything.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਮੈ ਕੀਆ ਸੋ ਮੈ ਪਾਇਆ ਦੋਸੁ ਨ ਦੀਜੈ ਅਵਰ ਜਨਾ ॥੨੧॥
lines.translit: jo mai keea so mai paaeaa dos na deejai avar janaa |21|
lines.english: Whatever I did, for that I have suffered; I do not blame anyone else. ||21||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸ ਦਾ ਦੀਆ ਸਭਨੀ ਲੀਆ ਕਰਮੀ ਕਰਮੀ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਪਇਆ ॥੨੨॥
lines.translit: tis daa deea sabhanee leea karamee karamee hukam peaa |22|
lines.english: His gifts are received by everyone; all act according to His Command. ||22||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਲੀ ਹਉ ਸੋਹਾਗਣਿ ਭੈਣੇ ਕੰਤੁ ਨ ਕਬਹੂੰ ਮੈ ਮਿਲਿਆ ॥੨੩॥
lines.translit: galee hau sohaagan bhaine kant na kabahoon mai miliaa |23|
lines.english: I am called the happy soul-bride, O sister, but my Husband Lord has never met me. ||23||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨੰਨੈ ਨਾਹ ਭੋਗ ਨਿਤ ਭੋਗੈ ਨਾ ਡੀਠਾ ਨਾ ਸੰਮ੍ਹਲਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: nanai naah bhog nit bhogai naa ddeetthaa naa samhaliaa |
lines.english: Nanna: The Husband Lord enjoys eternal pleasures, but He is not seen or understood.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੇਖੈ ਬੂਝੈ ਸਭੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਜਾਣੈ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਬਾਹਰਿ ਰਵਿ ਰਹਿਆ ॥੨੪॥
lines.translit: dekhai boojhai sabh kichh jaanai antar baahar rav rahiaa |24|
lines.english: He sees and understands, and knows everything; inwardly and outwardly, he is fully pervading. ||24||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਪੈ ਪਾਤਿਸਾਹੁ ਪਰਮੇਸਰੁ ਵੇਖਣ ਕਉ ਪਰਪੰਚੁ ਕੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: papai paatisaahu paramesar vekhan kau parapanch keea |
lines.english: Pappa: The Supreme King, the Transcendent Lord, created the world, and watches over it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦੀ ਸੇ ਨਰ ਉਬਰੇ ਜਿ ਹਰਿ ਸਰਣਾਗਤਿ ਭਜਿ ਪਇਆ ॥੨੫॥
lines.translit: gur parasaadee se nar ubare ji har saranaagat bhaj peaa |25|
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, they alone are saved, who hurry to enter the Lord's Sanctuary. ||25||

lines.gurmukhi: ਫਫੈ ਫਾਹੀ ਸਭੁ ਜਗੁ ਫਾਸਾ ਜਮ ਕੈ ਸੰਗਲਿ ਬੰਧਿ ਲਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: fafai faahee sabh jag faasaa jam kai sangal bandh leaa |
lines.english: Faffa: The whole world is caught in the noose of Death, and all are bound by its chains.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਬੈ ਬਾਜੀ ਖੇਲਣ ਲਾਗਾ ਚਉਪੜਿ ਕੀਤੇ ਚਾਰਿ ਜੁਗਾ ॥
lines.translit: babai baajee khelan laagaa chauparr keete chaar jugaa |
lines.english: Babba: He set out to play the game, on the chess-board of the four ages.
